data.headline: Sell Your Home for Top Dollar
data.tagline: Your Home. Your Future. My Priority.
data.body: I'm Patricia Collins, a NJ State Licensed REALTOR® with Evergreen Homes Realty. With 15 years of experience and over 200 homes sold, I know what it takes to get you the best price. Whether you're upsizing, downsizing, or making your first move — I'm here to guide you every step of the way.
data.cta_text: Get Your Free Home Value Report

data.title: Why Work With Me
data.subtitle: Full-service real estate from first call to closing day.

items.title: Free Home Valuation
items.description: Get a professional Comparative Market Analysis showing exactly what your home is worth in today's market — completely free.

items.title: Professional Photography & Staging
items.description: Every listing gets magazine-quality photos and virtual staging to make buyers fall in love online.

items.title: Strategic Pricing
items.description: Data-backed pricing strategies that attract competitive offers and avoid sitting on the market.

items.title: Maximum Exposure
items.description: MLS, Zillow, Realtor.com, social media ads, and targeted email campaigns to reach serious buyers fast.

items.title: Buyer Representation
items.description: Looking to buy? I'll help you find the right home, negotiate the best deal, and navigate inspections and closing.

items.title: Relocation Assistance
items.description: Moving in or out of the area? I coordinate with relocation specialists to make your transition seamless.

data.title: How It Works
data.subtitle: Three simple steps to get started.

steps.title: Submit Your Info
steps.description: Fill out the quick form below with your property details. Takes less than 2 minutes.

steps.title: Get Your Home Value Report
steps.description: I'll send you a personalized report showing what your home is worth based on recent comparable sales in your area.

steps.title: Meet & Plan
steps.description: We'll meet in person or virtually to discuss your goals and create a customized strategy.

data.title: Recently Sold by Patricia
data.subtitle: Real results for real families across Central New Jersey.

items.text: Patricia sold our home in just 5 days for over asking price! She handled everything from staging to closing with incredible professionalism. Cannot recommend her enough.
As first-time buyers, we were nervous about the process. Patricia made it feel easy and exciting. She found us the perfect home in our budget and negotiated a great deal.
We've worked with Patricia on three transactions now — buying our first home, selling it, and buying our forever home. She's our realtor for life!

data.title: What's Your Home Worth?
data.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation Home Value Report in minutes.
data.description: Enter your property details below and I'll send you a personalized market analysis based on recent sales in your neighborhood. **100% free, no obligation.**

data.title: About Patricia
bio: I'm Patricia Collins — a lifelong New Jersey resident, NJ State Licensed REALTOR®, and proud member of Evergreen Homes Realty. For over 15 years, I've helped families across Middlesex, Union, and Somerset Counties buy and sell homes with confidence.

With more than 200 successful transactions, I bring deep market knowledge and a personal touch to every deal. My clients know they can count on me for honest advice, clear communication, and results that exceed expectations.
When I'm not showing homes, you'll find me volunteering at the local food bank, cheering on my kids' soccer teams, or exploring the Jersey Shore.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.subheading: Your Home Value Report Is On Its Way!
thank_you.body: {firstName} will send your personalized report to your email shortly.
thank_you.disclaimer: This report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not an appraisal.
